posts.author: cannygui
posts.community: Infosys Limited - Are we getting a discount or no?
posts.text: CNBCTV18 – 23 Jun 26 Infosys AGM: 'AI won't replace firms like ours', says Nandan Nilekani - CNBC... At the AGM, Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director Salil Parekh reiterated the company's AI revenue outlook first shared during its third-quarter earnings update.
